fields.name: machineryID
fields.description: Reference to the Machinery collection that this activity belongs to. Links maintenance activities to specific equipment on vessels.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to the MaintenanceSchedule collection if this activity is part of a scheduled maintenance program. Null for ad-hoc activities.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short descriptive text of the maintenance activity to be performed, such as 'Oil change' or 'Valve inspection'.

fields.name: intervalDuration
fields.description: Human-entered interval text specifying how often this activity should be performed (e.g., '500', '6', 'annual'). Works with intervalDurationType.

fields.name: intervalDurationType
fields.description: Unit for interpreting intervalDuration field. Defines the time unit for maintenance scheduling intervals.

fields.name: adhocInterval
fields.description: Non-standard cadence indicator for activities that don't follow regular time intervals, such as voyage-based or condition-based maintenance.

fields.name: lastDoneOn
fields.description: Date when this activity was last completed successfully. Used for calculating next due dates and maintenance history tracking.

fields.name: workHistory
fields.description: Array of ActivityWorkHistory collection IDs that represent all execution instances of this activity over time.

fields.name: expectedManHours
fields.description: Estimated labor hours required to complete this activity. Used for resource planning and scheduling.

fields.name: expectedCost
fields.description: Estimated total cost for completing this activity including labor and parts. Used for budgeting and cost planning.

fields.name: requiredParts
fields.description: Array of estimated parts requirements for activity execution. Each object contains partID (reference to InventoryPart), estimatedQuantity (number), and isCritical (boolean) flag.

fields.name: estimatedPartsCost
fields.description: Calculated total estimated cost of all required parts for this activity. Derived from requiredParts array.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to MaintenanceSchedule collection linking this work history to a specific maintenance program for reporting and tracking.

fields.name: activityID
fields.description: Reference to the parent Activity collection that this work history execution belongs to. Links execution records to activity definitions.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection providing vessel context for quick queries, reporting, and filtering by vessel.

fields.name: _systemSet_seqNum
fields.description: System-managed sequence number used to chronologically order multiple work history entries for the same activity.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this is the current/latest work history entry for the activity. Only one entry per activity should be active.

fields.name: committed
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this work history has been finalized and committed. Committed entries cannot be modified.

fields.name: events
fields.description: Array of ActivityWorkHistoryEvent collection IDs representing the detailed execution timeline and steps performed during this work history.

fields.name: plannedDueDate
fields.description: Scheduled date when this maintenance work is planned to be completed. Used for scheduling and overdue tracking.

fields.name: previousDueDate
fields.description: Previous due date before any rescheduling occurred. Maintains audit trail of schedule changes.

fields.name: validatedForms
fields.description: Array of form validation status objects containing formTemplateID, formData, validation status, timestamps, and user information for forms associated with this work history.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to the parent ActivityWorkHistory collection that this event belongs to. Links individual work steps to the overall work history execution.

fields.name: performedOn
fields.description: Timestamp when this specific maintenance event or work step was performed. Used for chronological tracking of work execution.

fields.name: performedBy
fields.description: Reference to the User who performed this specific work event. Tracks individual accountability for maintenance steps.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Free-text description of the specific maintenance step, observation, or action performed during this event.

fields.name: activityCompletionStatus
fields.description: Lifecycle status of the overall activity at the time of this event. Tracks progression through maintenance workflow states.

fields.name: maintenanceType
fields.description: Classification of the type of maintenance work represented by this event. Used for categorizing and reporting maintenance activities.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Additional free-text comments or observations recorded during this maintenance event.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Array of file identifiers or paths for documents attached to this specific work event, such as photos, reports, or certificates.

fields.name: riskAssessment
fields.description: Reference or notes for risk assessment documentation linked to this maintenance event.

fields.name: damageDeficiency
fields.description: Notes documenting any damage, deficiencies, or issues observed during this maintenance event.

fields.name: actualManHours
fields.description: Actual labor hours spent on this specific maintenance event. Used for tracking actual vs estimated time.

fields.name: specialComments
fields.description: Special instructions, warnings, or important remarks related to this maintenance event.

fields.name: partsUsed
fields.description: Array of references to MaintenancePartUsage records documenting parts consumed during this work event.

fields.name: actualPartsCost
fields.description: Actual total cost of parts used during this specific maintenance event.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: shortName
fields.description: Short alphanumeric code identifying the maintenance schedule (8-16 characters). Used for quick reference and display.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to the Vessel collection that this maintenance schedule applies to. Links schedules to specific vessels.

fields.name: components
fields.description: Array of Component collection IDs that are included under this maintenance schedule for organizational grouping.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleDescription
fields.description: Detailed description of the maintenance schedule scope, purpose, and coverage area.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleRevisionHistory
fields.description: Array of revision history record IDs tracking changes and updates to this maintenance schedule over time.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this maintenance schedule is currently active and in use.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to the User who originally created this maintenance schedule.

fields.name: lastUpdatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to the User who most recently updated this maintenance schedule.

fields.name: userPermissions
fields.description: Array of user permission objects containing userID and permission arrays controlling access to this schedule.

fields.name: minScheduleYear
fields.description: Earliest year for which this maintenance schedule is valid and applicable.

fields.name: sfiCode
fields.description: Reference to SfiCode collection for classification of this maintenance schedule according to SFI standards.

fields.name: maxScheduleYear
fields.description: Latest year for which this maintenance schedule remains valid and applicable.

fields.name: machineryID
fields.description: Reference to the parent Machinery collection that this component belongs to. Creates hierarchical relationship between machinery and its components.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection if this component is vessel-specific. Provides vessel context for component management.

fields.name: parentComponentID
fields.description: Reference to another Component in this collection for hierarchical component structures. Creates parent-child relationships between components.

fields.name: componentName
fields.description: Human-readable name of the component such as 'Main Engine Cylinder Head' or 'Fuel Pump Assembly'.

fields.name: sfiCode
fields.description: Reference to SfiCode collection for standardized classification of this component according to SFI coding system.

fields.name: componentID
fields.description: Reference to Component collection that groups and organizes the associated activities. Links activities to specific components.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection providing vessel context for this component-activity mapping.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to MaintenanceSchedule collection providing schedule context for this mapping relationship.

fields.name: activityIDs
fields.description: Array of Activity collection IDs that are mapped to and organized under this component grouping.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection that owns and operates this machinery. Links equipment to specific vessels.

fields.name: machineryName
fields.description: Descriptive name of the machinery such as 'Main Engine', 'Generator #1', or 'Steering Gear'.

fields.name: machineryDescription
fields.description: Optional detailed description providing additional information about the machinery specifications or characteristics.

fields.name: avgRunningHoursPerMonth
fields.description: Average monthly operating hours for this machinery. Used for maintenance planning and interval calculations.

fields.name: actualRunningHoursSinceLastMaintenance
fields.description: Cumulative running hours since the last completed maintenance activity. Used for hour-based maintenance scheduling.

fields.name: vesselName
fields.description: Official registered name of the vessel as it appears in maritime documentation.

fields.name: vessel_IMO_Number
fields.description: International Maritime Organization (IMO) number uniquely identifying this vessel globally.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization that operates and manages this vessel.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and organization-specific SFI code management.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Hierarchical SFI category code following standard format (e.g., '1.', '101.', '101.001'). Used for systematic classification.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the SFI category such as 'Hull Structure' or 'Main Propulsion'.

fields.name: level
fields.description: Hierarchical level indicator (1-5) showing the depth of this SFI code in the classification tree structure.

fields.name: parentCategory
fields.description: Reference to parent SFI category code in this collection, creating hierarchical relationships between SFI codes.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional detailed description explaining the scope and coverage of this SFI category.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this SFI category is currently active and available for use.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and template access control.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Descriptive name of the form template such as 'Engine Room Inspection' or 'Safety Checklist'.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed description explaining the purpose and usage of this form template.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to the User who originally created this form template.

fields.name: updatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to the User who most recently updated this form template.

fields.name: sections
fields.description: Array of form section objects containing id, title, description, columns, and order for organizing form fields into logical groups.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Array of form field objects defining the structure and validation rules for form inputs. Each field contains type, label, validation rules, and display properties.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this form template is currently active and available for use.

fields.name: isSystemTemplate
fields.description: Boolean flag marking system-provided templates that cannot be modified by users.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Optional instance name for this specific form completion. May be auto-generated or user-provided.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of this specific form instance or completion context.

fields.name: formTemplateID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplate collection that this form instance is based on. Links completed forms to their template structure.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection providing vessel context for this form completion.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Start date for this form instance or recurring form sequence. Used for scheduling and tracking.

fields.name: intervalValue
fields.description: Numeric interval step value for recurring forms. Works with intervalUnit to define recurrence pattern.

fields.name: intervalUnit
fields.description: Time unit for form recurrence intervals. Defines how often recurring forms should be completed.

fields.name: nextDueDate
fields.description: Next scheduled due date for recurring forms. Used for tracking upcoming form completions.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current submission and approval status of this form instance.

fields.name: formData
fields.description: Key-value object containing all user-entered answers and data for this form completion.

fields.name: submittedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who submitted this form for review or processing.

fields.name: submittedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this form was submitted by the user.

fields.name: committedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who committed/approved this form as final.

fields.name: committedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this form was committed/approved as final.

fields.name: isProxy
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this is a cloned/proxy form created from another form instance.

fields.name: activityMappingID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplateActivityMapping collection if this form is associated with maintenance activities.

fields.name: activityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory collection if this form is linked to specific maintenance work execution.

fields.name: proxyFormID
fields.description: Reference to the original Form in this collection if this is a proxy/cloned form.

fields.name: vesselMappingID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplateVesselMapping collection linking this form to vessel-specific scheduling.

fields.name: isAdhoc
fields.description: Boolean flag marking ad-hoc forms that are not part of a planned recurring cycle.

fields.name: templateSnapshot
fields.description: Captured template structure at form creation time. Preserves form structure even if template changes later.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who originally created this form instance.

fields.name: updatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this form instance.

fields.name: formID
fields.description: Reference to Form collection that this action history entry relates to. Links audit trail to specific form instances.

fields.name: actionType
fields.description: Type of action performed on the form. Used for tracking form lifecycle and workflow progression.

fields.name: actionBy
fields.description: Reference to User who performed this action on the form. Provides accountability and audit trail.

fields.name: actionAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this action was performed on the form.

fields.name: message
fields.description: Optional message or reason provided by the user when performing this action.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: formTemplateID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplate collection being scheduled and assigned to a vessel.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection that this form template is being assigned to for recurring completion.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: Start date for the recurring form schedule on this vessel.

fields.name: intervalValue
fields.description: Numeric step value for form recurrence. Works with intervalUnit to define how often forms are due.

fields.name: intervalUnit
fields.description: Time unit for form recurrence cadence on this vessel.

fields.name: isAdhoc
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this mapping is for ad-hoc (non-recurring) form completion.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who created this vessel mapping assignment.

fields.name: updatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this vessel mapping.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and access control.

fields.name: formTemplateID
fields.description: Reference to FormTemplate collection being associated with maintenance activities.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection providing vessel context for this form-activity mapping.

fields.name: maintenanceScheduleID
fields.description: Reference to MaintenanceSchedule collection providing schedule context for this mapping.

fields.name: activityIDs
fields.description: Array of Activity collection IDs that require or may use this form template during execution.

fields.name: requiredForStatuses
fields.description: Array of activity completion statuses that require this form to be completed before proceeding.

fields.name: isOptional
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this form is optional rather than required for the associated activities.

fields.name: createdByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who created this form-activity mapping.

fields.name: updatedByUserID
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this mapping.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and document access control.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection if this document is vessel-specific. Provides vessel context for document management.

fields.name: documentName
fields.description: Human-friendly name of the document for display and identification purposes.

fields.name: documentType
fields.description: Classification category of the document such as 'Manual', 'Certificate', 'Report', or 'Drawing'.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed description or abstract explaining the content and purpose of this document.

fields.name: currentVersionId
fields.description: Reference to DocumentFile collection indicating the latest active version of this document.

fields.name: fileVersions
fields.description: Array of DocumentFile collection IDs representing all versions of this document over time.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Reference to User who originally created this document record.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this document metadata.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle state of the document affecting its availability and usage.

fields.name: isDeleted
fields.description: Soft delete flag indicating if this document has been marked for deletion.

fields.name: documentMetadataId
fields.description: Reference to DocumentMetadata collection that this file version belongs to. Links file versions to document records.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Version label or number for this specific file version such as 'v1.0', 'Rev A', or '2024-01'.

fields.name: versionDescription
fields.description: Notes describing what changed in this version compared to previous versions.

fields.name: fileName
fields.description: Stored file name used in the file system or storage backend.

fields.name: originalFileName
fields.description: Original file name as uploaded by the user, preserved for download purposes.

fields.name: fileSize
fields.description: File size in bytes for storage tracking and download information.

fields.name: mimeType
fields.description: MIME type of the file indicating the file format and content type.

fields.name: gridFSFileId
fields.description: GridFS file identifier for the actual file content stored in MongoDB GridFS.

fields.name: uploadedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who uploaded this specific file version.

fields.name: uploadedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this file version was uploaded to the system.

fields.name: approvedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who approved this file version if approval workflow is required.

fields.name: approvedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when this file version was approved if approval workflow is required.

fields.name: previousVersionId
fields.description: Reference to previous DocumentFile in this collection, creating version chain history.

fields.name: isLatest
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this is the current active version of the document.

fields.name: gridFSMetadata
fields.description: Additional metadata object from GridFS storage containing file system information.

fields.name: isDeleted
fields.description: Soft delete flag for this specific file version.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and inventory access control.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection if this part is vessel-specific. Optional field for vessel-dedicated inventory items.

fields.name: partNumber
fields.description: Manufacturer or internal part number used for identification and ordering purposes.

fields.name: partName
fields.description: Descriptive name of the part such as 'Oil Filter' or 'Fuel Injector'.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Detailed description of the part including specifications and usage information.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Primary category classification for organizing and grouping similar parts.

fields.name: subcategory
fields.description: Secondary category classification for more specific part grouping within categories.

fields.name: sfiCode
fields.description: Reference to SfiCode collection for standardized classification of this part according to SFI system.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit of measure for this part used in inventory tracking and ordering.

fields.name: reorderLevel
fields.description: Minimum quantity threshold that triggers reordering alerts and procurement processes.

fields.name: maxStockLevel
fields.description: Maximum recommended stock level to avoid overstocking and storage issues.

fields.name: leadTimeDays
fields.description: Typical procurement lead time in days from order to delivery.

fields.name: unitCost
fields.description: Current cost per unit for budgeting and cost calculations.

fields.name: preferredVendorID
fields.description: Reference to Vendor collection indicating the preferred supplier for this part.

fields.name: alternativeVendors
fields.description: Array of Vendor collection IDs representing alternative suppliers for this part.

fields.name: specifications
fields.description: Structured object containing technical specifications and properties of this part.

fields.name: compatibleMachinery
fields.description: Array of Machinery collection IDs indicating which equipment this part is compatible with.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this part is currently active and available for use.

fields.name: isCritical
fields.description: Boolean flag marking critical spare parts that require special attention and stock control.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and location access control.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection for vessel-based storage locations. Optional for shore-based locations.

fields.name: locationCode
fields.description: Short alphanumeric code identifying the location such as 'ENG-01' or 'STORE-A'.

fields.name: locationName
fields.description: Human-readable name of the storage location such as 'Engine Room Store' or 'Main Warehouse'.

fields.name: locationType
fields.description: Classification of the storage location type for organizational and operational purposes.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Optional detailed description of the location including access instructions or special characteristics.

fields.name: parentLocationID
fields.description: Reference to another InventoryLocation in this collection for hierarchical location structures.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this location is currently active and available for inventory storage.

fields.name: system
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating if this is a system-managed location such as virtual work sites.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and stock access control.

fields.name: partID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryPart collection indicating which part this stock record tracks.

fields.name: locationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation collection indicating where this stock is physically stored.

fields.name: currentQuantity
fields.description: Current physical quantity of this part available at this location.

fields.name: reservedQuantity
fields.description: Quantity reserved for planned usage or pending work orders, not available for new allocations.

fields.name: availableQuantity
fields.description: Auto-calculated available quantity (currentQuantity minus reservedQuantity) for new allocations.

fields.name: lastCountDate
fields.description: Date when the last physical inventory count was performed for this stock item.

fields.name: lastCountBy
fields.description: Reference to User who performed the last physical inventory count.

fields.name: averageMonthlyConsumption
fields.description: Calculated average monthly consumption rate used for reorder planning and forecasting.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and transaction access control.

fields.name: partID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryPart collection indicating which part was moved in this transaction.

fields.name: transactionType
fields.description: Type of inventory movement operation performed in this transaction.

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Movement quantity with positive values for receipts and negative values for issues.

fields.name: fromLocationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation collection indicating source location for issues and transfers.

fields.name: toLocationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation collection indicating destination location for receipts and transfers.

fields.name: relatedActivityWorkHistoryID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistory collection if this transaction is linked to maintenance work execution.

fields.name: relatedActivityWorkHistoryEventID
fields.description: Reference to ActivityWorkHistoryEvent collection if this transaction is linked to a specific work event.

fields.name: relatedPurchaseOrderID
fields.description: Reference to PurchaseOrder collection if this transaction is linked to procurement activities.

fields.name: relatedReplenishOrderID
fields.description: Reference to ReplenishOrder collection if this transaction is linked to replenishment requests.

fields.name: performedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who performed this inventory transaction.

fields.name: authorizedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who authorized this transaction if approval is required for restricted movements.

fields.name: unitCost
fields.description: Unit cost used at the time of this transaction for cost accounting purposes.

fields.name: totalCost
fields.description: Computed total cost of this transaction (absolute quantity multiplied by unit cost).

fields.name: reason
fields.description: Free-text reason or justification for this inventory transaction.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Additional free-text comments or notes about this transaction.

fields.name: documentReferences
fields.description: Array of supporting document paths or IDs related to this transaction.

fields.name: transactionDate
fields.description: Timestamp when this inventory transaction was performed.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and vendor access control.

fields.name: vendorCode
fields.description: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying this vendor for quick reference and system integration.

fields.name: vendorName
fields.description: Official company name of the vendor or supplier organization.

fields.name: contactInfo
fields.description: Structured object containing vendor contact information including address, phone, email, and contact person details.

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.description: Free-text description of payment terms and conditions agreed with this vendor.

fields.name: leadTimeDays
fields.description: Typical lead time in days for orders from this vendor, used for procurement planning.

fields.name: qualityRating
fields.description: Quality performance rating for this vendor on a scale of 1-5, used for vendor evaluation.

fields.name: deliveryRating
fields.description: Delivery performance rating for this vendor on a scale of 1-5, used for vendor evaluation.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this vendor is currently active and available for new orders.

fields.name: specializations
fields.description: Array of specialization areas or categories that this vendor focuses on or excels in.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and purchase order access control.

fields.name: poNumber
fields.description: Auto-generated unique purchase order number used for tracking and reference purposes.

fields.name: vendorID
fields.description: Reference to Vendor collection indicating which supplier will fulfill this purchase order.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection if this purchase order is for vessel-specific items. Optional field.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the purchase order tracking its progression through the procurement process.

fields.name: orderDate
fields.description: Date when this purchase order was officially placed with the vendor.

fields.name: expectedDeliveryDate
fields.description: Expected or promised delivery date from the vendor for this purchase order.

fields.name: actualDeliveryDate
fields.description: Actual date when the purchase order was completely delivered and received.

fields.name: orderedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who placed this purchase order.

fields.name: approvedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who approved this purchase order if approval workflow is required.

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.description: Total monetary amount for this purchase order including all line items.

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO currency code for the monetary amounts in this purchase order.

fields.name: lineItems
fields.description: Array of line item objects containing partID, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice, receivedQuantity, and urgency for each ordered item.

fields.name: deliveryLocation
fields.description: Free-text delivery location instructions and address for this purchase order.

fields.name: specialInstructions
fields.description: Additional special instructions or requirements for this purchase order.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and replenish order access control.

fields.name: orderNumber
fields.description: Unique replenish order number with year prefix for tracking and reference purposes.

fields.name: itemID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryPart collection indicating which part is being requested for replenishment.

fields.name: vesselID
fields.description: Reference to Vessel collection indicating which vessel is requesting the replenishment.

fields.name: toLocationID
fields.description: Reference to InventoryLocation collection indicating the target location where replenished stock should be delivered.

fields.name: requestedQuantity
fields.description: Quantity of the part requested for replenishment by the vessel or location.

fields.name: receivedQuantity
fields.description: Quantity actually received so far, tracking partial deliveries against the requested amount.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the replenish order tracking its progression through the fulfillment process.

fields.name: requestedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who submitted this replenishment request.

fields.name: remarks
fields.description: Additional remarks or special instructions related to this replenishment request.

fields.name: purchaseOrderID
fields.description: Reference to PurchaseOrder collection if this replenishment is linked to a specific purchase order.

fields.name: documents
fields.description: Array of document attachments or file references related to this replenish order.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and tag access control.

fields.name: tagName
fields.description: Short descriptive label for the tag with maximum 16 characters for consistent display.

fields.name: tagColor
fields.description: Hex color code for visual representation of this tag in user interfaces.

fields.name: taggedItems
fields.description: Array of association objects linking this tag to various items. Each object contains itemType, itemID, taggedAt, taggedBy, inherited flag, and inheritedFrom information.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Reference to User who originally created this searchable tag.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this tag definition or associations.

fields.name: organizationID
fields.description: Reference to the owning organization. Used for multi-tenant data isolation and saved search access control.

fields.name: searchName
fields.description: User-defined name for this saved search query for easy identification and reuse.

fields.name: searchParameters
fields.description: Array of search chips, terms, and filter criteria that define this saved search query.

fields.name: createdBy
fields.description: Reference to User who created this saved search query.

fields.name: updatedBy
fields.description: Reference to User who most recently updated this saved search query.
